sentence.chinese: 推進七十一年前，事件前夕，
sentence.ab: Embrinah lmnglung hngkwasan Maxal mngari kbkuy mtrul, brah diyax ndaan npaqan Tanah Tunux ciida,

sentence.chinese: 傳言說，
sentence.ab: bnhangan ka nurangan kari dha,

sentence.chinese: 在比星星還要安靜的巴蘭山谷，
sentence.ab: rmabang bay mmlux dha ppngrah ka ayu alang Paran,

sentence.chinese: 鬼火杳然飄落，
sentence.ab: ini balay ssquwaq skaya mi mtuting ka puniq utux,

sentence.chinese: 長形，圓短形，
sentence.ab: bbaraw mi bbutun mtumun ka hnyuwan na,

sentence.chinese: 燃燒著預言，
sentence.ab: miyah psranaq pnweela kari nurangan dha,

sentence.chinese: 血腥溢滿：「台灣神社祭典日」
sentence.ab: htngayan mi mccuwiq psdara ka “diyax smsman jingcya Taywan ciida.”

sentence.chinese: 來年櫻花祭，收容所獻上祭品，
sentence.ab: Pnskarac diyax bwaan hkawas, musa muway bari qnlangan sphmkan,

sentence.chinese: 是剷除猛虎長期的踐踏？
sentence.ab: ya wada pkrsung qnbsyaqan qnqahan smtali rklic?

sentence.chinese: 是血債血還？
sentence.ab: Ya wada ppsdara mcciyuk?

sentence.chinese: 是為生存，公義獵區紛爭？
sentence.ab: Ya smatang iyux keudus mi msdrux, mllingay ttdiyal smdupan knpuwan?

sentence.chinese: 是殖民者慣用技倆，致使部落相絀？
sentence.ab: Ya snpngan empklawa klwaan kndadax icil kddiyax? Dhuq mllingay ka pnluban dalang,

sentence.chinese: 殖民者滅族計畫？
sentence.ab: Ya snpngan pkngtun empklawa klwaan icil?

sentence.chinese: 還是老人不願公開：「點火的女人？」
sentence.ab: Uxay uri u ini dha srwai ptrawah pkla ka, “Qridil mutung puniq?”

sentence.chinese: 解釋權大筆，於更迭政權中自如揮舞著，
sentence.ab: Biyax matas ppkla, wada spuda lnglungan dha nanaq matas kngkingal knpryuxan empklawa klwaan icil,

sentence.chinese: 真相被架到霧的深處，
sentence.ab: wada pqyaun sputing qnrbqan qmprangan rulungan ka balay bay,

sentence.chinese: 文史探索者，深掘滲進地極的記憶，
sentence.ab: qmquring empatas ndaan Sediq, psrbuq mrmux kmari lnglungan truma lipax dxral,

sentence.chinese: 或許已埋入馬赫坡後岩窟，
sentence.ab: yabay wada rbngan lhngaw bukuy dwiyaq alang Mhbu,

sentence.chinese: 也可能隨受不了飛機轟炸後無形的索命氣味？
sentence.ab: yabay wada thuy uxay dha dhqun smknux uka hnyuwan knux ndaan cmbu skoki?

sentence.chinese: 選擇如銅鈴懸吊滿樹的冷黑屍骸腐爛？
sentence.ab: Wada mwaaw so kring pqyaan qqhuni ka knskiyan msburaw dbqrus mqalux?

sentence.chinese: 抑四濺的血液蒸發一般，
sentence.ab: Rahuq na u wada so mquri ssiyaw ppraq ka pntlxan ddara wada kmdudul uka.

sentence.chinese: 彩虹是否能及時出現，捲走風雲？
sentence.ab: Ya miyah nhari pcriyu ka hakaw utux mi spriqan na madas ka bbihur mi rrulung?

sentence.chinese: 能留聲繪影，穿破團霧，遞嬗後代？
sentence.ab: ya mtduwa hmiti mselxan hngak mi sasaw? Splihu muda meytaq qnprangan kukung, musa pslutuc lutuc?

sentence.chinese: 釘根本土的原住民，
sentence.ab: Mdhu tmdxral sediq tmpusu,

sentence.chinese: 山林，自然倫理規範的哨兵，
sentence.ab: qmlahang wwaya llmiqu mi ida nkiya ka empskrabi,

sentence.chinese: 分享命運的喜悅與悲情，編織屬於自己的文路，
sentence.ab: csdamac mi mqaras mpprngaw ndaan dha, tminun patas elu kndusan ndhiya nanaq,

sentence.chinese: 能否能跨越彩虹橋？
sentence.ab: Ya mtduwa muda mkraaw Hakaw Utux?

sentence.chinese: 與編織神靈的祖靈再次相遇？
sentence.ab: Musa mstrung duwan dha Utux Tmninun?
